name: Favorite Oatmeal Date Cookies
recipeIngredient: May be substituted with other nut butters
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop dates in a food processor.
2. Add part or all of the water and blend until the dates are pureed.
3. Pour the puree and any remaining water into a very large mixing bowl.
4. Add tahini and blend well.
5. Add wheat germ, oats, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; blend well.
6. Add vanilla while beating the dough.
7. Slowly blend in nuts and raisins. The batter will be very stiff.
8. Blend until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
9. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
10. Drop dough onto a non-stick baking sheet and flatten with a spoon, or shape by hand into desired shapes.
11. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes or more at 350 degrees F, depending on the thickness of the cookies. Store in the refrigerator.
